name: ai-collab-review
description: AI collaboration proficiency analyzer. Evaluates how effectively you work with AI through 6 axes: purpose design, context supply, exploration expansion, dialogue steering, verification & adoption, and learning asset creation. Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Cline, Roo Code, Windsurf, Antigravity logs, and manual exports from ChatGPT/Claude.ai/Gemini.
